should_trigger.input: Verify that this fix properly addresses the review comments
should_trigger.reason: Direct fix verification request — primary use case

should_trigger.input: What's confirmed and what's still open after my fix?
should_trigger.reason: Asks to separate confirmed from unconfirmed state

should_trigger.input: I addressed the findings — can you organize what's done and what's still at risk?
should_trigger.reason: Requests risk and verification organization after a fix

should_not_trigger.reason: Finding issues is review-changes; this Skill verifies a fix was effective
Accept/reject decisions on findings are triage-review-feedback

should_not_trigger.input: Implement the fix for this finding
